text:
was the brother of Conny Springer and a resident in Ragako village. He was transformed into a Titan by the Beast Titan during Wall Rose's supposed breach.

Appearance

Human

Martin was a small boy, who wore a loose green shirt. He had medium length dark blond hair and bright, yellow-colored eyes.

Story

Clash of the Titans arc

Martin Springer is revealed for the first time during a flashback. When Conny arrives to Ragako looking for survivors, he recalls a time when he had a happy family. Conny looks for his family heavily worried with no result. It is later revealed that Martin was one of the Titans that were created by the Beast Titan after the events of Eren and Annie's brawl in Stohess District. His Titan is eventually killed at some point before Wall Rose was declared Titan-free.

Trivia

Martin is a Latin name that means "Dedicated to Mars", which is a Roman god.
